mapper.select: SELECT attach_no, ref_type, ref_no, orig_nm, save_nm, file_path, file_size, file_ext, created_at, created_by FROM tb_file_attach WHERE ref_type = #{refType} AND ref_no = #{refNo} ORDER BY attach_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_file_attach WHERE ref_type = #{refType} AND ref_no = #{refNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_file_attach (ref_type, ref_no, orig_nm, save_nm, file_path, file_size, file_ext, created_by) VALUES (#{refType}, #{refNo}, #{origNm}, #{saveNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_file_attach WHERE ref_type = #{refType} AND ref_no = #{refNo}
